heroLead: Steel-skinned insulated panels engineered for cold storage, food processing, pharmaceutical, and any controlled-temperature application. Airtight, cam-locked, pre-finished.
overviewH2: Precision cold storage. Built to last.
overviewPara1: Panelcore® steel-skinned insulated panels are engineered for controlled-temperature environments — from walk-in cool rooms to large-scale pharmaceutical and food processing facilities.
overviewPara2: Each panel features pre-finished Colorbond steel skins bonded to a high-density polyurethane foam core. The cam-lock joining system creates an airtight, seamless envelope that maintains consistent internal temperatures.
overviewPara3: Available in a wide range of thicknesses and lengths, Panelcore® panels are suitable for new builds and retrofits. The modular system allows rapid assembly on site with no special tools or trades required.

advantages.title: Airtight envelope
advantages.copy: Cam-lock joining system eliminates cold bridges and air infiltration.

advantages.title: Rapid assembly
advantages.copy: Modular panels install without specialist trades or equipment.

advantages.title: Full temperature range
advantages.copy: Suitable for refrigeration (-2°C) through deep freeze (-40°C).

advantages.title: Pre-finished steel
advantages.copy: Colorbond skins are hygienic, food-safe, and easy to clean.

advantages.title: Modular sizing
advantages.copy: Custom-cut panels for any footprint, height, or door configuration.
